context: Tests whether the agent corrects MusicKit setup and authorization guidance without preserving an invented entitlement requirement.

checklist.name: MusicKit App Service
checklist.description: Recommends enabling MusicKit App Service for the app's explicit bundle ID so automatic developer token generation is configured.

checklist.name: Usage description
checklist.description: Requires NSAppleMusicUsageDescription before accessing the user's music data or media library.

checklist.name: Authorization behavior
checklist.description: Explains that MusicAuthorization.request() presents the system consent dialog when necessary and that currentStatus can inspect access without prompting.

checklist.name: No invented entitlement
checklist.description: Does not claim that com.apple.developer.musickit is the required app entitlement or that a missing entitlement causes authorization to crash.

checklist.name: Background scope
checklist.description: Treats UIBackgroundModes audio as needed for background playback, not as universal setup for catalog search.
